name: Scallop Saute
recipeInstructions:
1. Season the scallops with flour.
2. Heat oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
3. Add scallops in batches and cook until lightly browned, wiping away any excess fat after cooking each batch.
4. In a separate large saute pan, melt butter. Add onions and cook until soft.
5. Stir in mushrooms, shallot, garlic, salt, and pepper. Cook until the mushrooms are tender.
6. Add scallops, lemon juice, and wine. Simmer for 4 minutes, shaking the pan occasionally.
7. Do not boil. Serve hot.
